hypothesis: Applying inverse-frequency class reweighting during training of a template-free single-step retrosynthesis model on USPTO-retro will increase top-10 accuracy for rare templates (frequency ≤10) by at least 10 percentage points and at least double top-10 accuracy on Pistachio OOD, without decreasing USPTO-retro top-5 round-trip accuracy by more than 2 percentage points compared to an unweighted baseline.
